title: VaultProof Agent Guard — Pre-execution wallet guard for AI agents (alpha)
description: VaultProof Agent Guard is a non-custodial, pre-execution wallet guard for AI agents. It evaluates proposed blockchain transactions (spend caps, allowlists, drain vectors, parameter integrity) and returns ALLOW / HOLD / DENY before anything signs. This is an experimental alpha reference implementation of Verification Before Execution, with a reproducible test suite and a documented threat model. It is not audited and is not intended for use with production funds. Built on the ExecutionProof gate and the RF-100 governance standard by Remnant Fieldworks Inc.
